title: The Feminine Joy (BTA)
description:
Gives the Player Feminine Hurt sounds.
Made for "Better Than Adventure!".
body:
**_Hey, do you wish to use this in Modern Minecraft? Well, you can! Download my Resource Pack, [Resounding Luminescence](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/resounding-luminescence), and combine it with [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)!_**

This is a Texture Pack, designed for "[Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)", that gives the Player Female Hurt sounds.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fm9-rX6oP1c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# CREDITS

- Sounds by [Yudena](https://freesound.org/people/Yudena/), [AmeAngelofSin](https://freesound.org/people/AmeAngelofSin/) & [tcrocker68](https://freesound.org/people/tcrocker68/), edited and curated by AndreWharn for this pack.
- "pack.png" made by AndreWharn.
- No copyright infringements are intended, please contact me on Discord immediately if there's something wrong: https://andrewharn.carrd.co
- Do not use the assets without permission, please!

# Thanks for using this pack! :D
